title: Allahabad HC Justice Shekhar Kumar Yadav set to retire amid stalled impeachment over remarks on Muslims
description: Allahabad High Court Justice Shekhar Kumar Yadav, whose remarks against Muslims during a Vishva Hindu Parishad (VHP) event sparked nationwide outrage, is set to retire on April 15, even as the impeachment proceedings initiated against him remain stalled.The High Court will hold a full court reference on the same day to mark his retirement, bringing to a close a tenure that drew intense scrutiny in its final years.Justice Yadav was appointed as an additional judge of the Allahabad High Court on D
